objective: In `BayesianDetector.train_best_detector`, reject unsupported CPU training by changing the device condition from `torch_device.type in ("cuda", "tpu")` to `not in`, and add focused CPU-reject and accelerator-accept regression tests without requiring physical accelerator hardware.
completion_criteria: Mock the downstream training work and assert that a CPU device raises the documented error while CUDA and TPU device types pass the guard. Run the detector's focused tests and verify the condition agrees with its error message.
non_results: Finite computation outside its stated range is not a proof of a universal claim.
A candidate is not a solution until independent and human review are recorded.
Restating a known reduction, checking examples, or giving an unproved key lemma is not terminal success.

baseline_review.requirement: Audit exact statement/status, prior work, established facts, ruled-out routes, open leads, tools, and acceptance path before technical research.

synthesis_summary: The existing review patch against upstream addb4a1 changes `in` to `not in` and adds focused CPU rejection plus CUDA/TPU acceptance regressions. Run 2 replayed the exact-method suite (3/3), pristine inverse behavior, an independent checker, and clean apply check from an external environment, repairing the prior evidence-packaging failure. Full ML dependencies and accelerator hardware were not used.

established_facts.claim: Pristine addb4a1 has the inverted CPU/CUDA/TPU initial-guard behavior.
The proposed patch satisfies the three-case mocked verification contract and applies to the pinned index.

strategies.hypothesis: Changing the guard to `torch_device.type not in ("cuda", "tpu")` makes CPU raise before downstream work while CUDA and TPU reach mocked training.
strategies.discriminating_test: Exhaust the three verification-contract device types on the exact method and compare with pristine addb4a1; separately evaluate the parsed guard truth table.

strategies.reopen_condition: Reopen implementation only if upstream main changes the method/tests, CI exposes an integration failure, or maintainers alter the supported device tokens.
strategies.reopen_evidence: The prior evidence-packaging condition was satisfied by moving the environment outside the workspace and replaying all checks in new receipts.

failure_signatures.signature: A two-token allowlist coupled to a CPU-only error message used membership rather than non-membership; evidence receipts also fail when mutable workspace virtual-environment symlinks are included.

constraints_learned.constraint: The corrected initial guard admits exactly the source-declared cuda and tpu tokens and rejects every other type before processing.
constraints_learned.scope: BayesianDetector.train_best_detector at addb4a1 plus patch df1d9a58...c1caefd

decision_history.prediction: Pristine source will accept CPU and reject CUDA/TPU; the patch will invert all three outcomes and reject CPU before downstream work.
decision_history.observation: Pristine behavior matched the bug; all three patched cases passed; the independent checker and pinned-index apply check passed.
decision_history.surprise: The only prior gate failure was evidence packaging by workspace-local virtual-environment symlinks, not implementation or test behavior.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Human-authorized application to an upstream fork followed by repository CI.

reduction_ledger.represented_space_before: The source-declared supported tokens {cuda,tpu} and every value outside that set
reduction_ledger.eliminated_or_quotiented: Every unsupported token is equivalent under the initial membership guard; cpu represents that complement, while cuda and tpu are checked individually.
reduction_ledger.represented_space_after: Three guard-equivalence cases: cpu, cuda, tpu
reduction_ledger.reduction_factor: infinite unsupported token domain quotiented to one equivalence class; two supported singleton classes retained
reduction_ledger.coverage_scope: Initial device guard in BayesianDetector.train_best_detector only
reduction_ledger.soundness_basis: The initial branch observes only torch_device.type membership in the exact two-element tuple; independent AST inspection verifies no earlier executable statement or additional predicate.
reduction_ledger.remaining_unknown: Actual accelerator execution, training numerics, full repository CI, and maintainer acceptance are outside this quotient and remain unchecked.
reduction_ledger.next_bulk_elimination: not applicable; the stated branch contract is exhausted

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: Issue #26 proposes the operator change; this contribution adds a review-ready patch, focused CPU/CUDA/TPU regressions, pristine mutation control, independent checker, and reproducible receipts.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: An unindexed fork could contain the same fix; current main remains unfixed and the exact repository PR search for train_best_detector has zero results.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Compare the live main guard and repository PR search with the patch and focused tests.
